Your Trusted Pest
Management Partner

Delivering proactive pest control through Integrated Pest Management, disinfection, and pest-proofing. Backed by Pharmcle Korea's excellence, to keep Philippine businesses pest-free.

Zaps Customized Pest Management Solutions

Delivers tailored, EFFECTIVE PEST MANAGEMENT through continuous identification, planning, treatment, monitoring, and improvement.

IDENTIFYDiagnose the problem, Root Cause, Site Assessment
PLANCorrective Action, Continuous Improvement Plan, Additional Recommendation
TREATStrategic & effective Treatment, Proactive Approach
MONITORConsistent reports & Updates, Monitor & Document Results
